title: QA Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, java. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: CloudForge is hiring a middle qa engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V052: QA Engineer at CloudForge. Location: Kharkiv. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 3.2 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, java, test automation. Optional skills: ci/cd, bug reporting. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
